style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A central hub labelled « GOUVERNANCE » connects by straight spokes to six outer nodes labelled « PRESTATION ». Three of the spokes carry small tags reading « DONNÉES », « APPROVISIONNEMENT », and « ÉLABORATION DE SOLUTIONS ». Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A central hub labelled « GOUVERNANCE » connects by straight spokes to six outer nodes labelled « PRESTATION ». Three of the spokes carry small tags reading « DONNÉES », « APPROVISIONNEMENT », and « ÉLABORATION DE SOLUTIONS ». Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
